Secs. 4c-1 and 4c-2. Department of Business Regulation. Sec. 4c-3. Commissioner of Business Regulation.

Secs. 4c-1 and 4c-2. Department of Business Regulation. Sections 4c-1 and 4c-2 are repealed.

(P.A. 77-614, S. 610, 610a.)

Sec. 4c-3. Commissioner of Business Regulation. Obsolete.

Note: Sections 4c-1 to 4c-3, inclusive, were formerly published as chapter 58.
